parents.subject: LU-12186 utils: Add parity flag to correct places

commit.subject: LU-16518 lst: fix switch-case unannotated fall-through
commit.message:
LU-16518 lst: fix switch-case unannotated fall-through

Convert the service #define statements to an enum
srpc_service_type. Explicitly handle each case in
srpc_service2request() to avoid the unannotated fall
through error reported by Clang. Increase SRPC_SERVICE_MAX_ID
by 1 to avoid a conflict with SRPC_SERVICE_PING - and
adjust callers to account for this.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I1b424c219f763e507586a0360fb2edffe2d07d76
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58344
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Chris Horn <chris.horn@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
